creator: vmagerya@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 162395
wordgrinder-0.6.diff

Update editors/wordgrinder from 0.5.2 to 0.6.

There's a changelog at [1], but the biggest change is the addition
of X11 interface. I've made it optional and enabled by default.

I'd like to ask whoever is willing to commit this to test building
with and without the X11 option on a clean manchine, because
with this kind of change, I could have missed a dependency, or
mess up in some other way.

[1] https://github.com/davidgiven/wordgrinder/releases/tag/0.6
